experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
experience.description: Building scalable backend systems and AI-driven features for enterprise platforms.
highlights: Redesigned UUID storage architecture in cloud connectivity services, increasing supported inter-region network connections from 55 to 165 (3× scalability improvement) without database schema migration
Built time-series metric retrieval services with dynamic baseline computation and intelligent switching between raw and pre-aggregated tables to optimize performance
Designed automated CVE ingestion and remediation prototype integrating vendor advisories with Network Automation workflows, reducing manual security triage effort
Built internal LLM-based tools including AI-assisted Remote CLI and Text-to-SQL assistant for troubleshooting workflows
Worked with Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, and Linux-based deployment environments
Recognized 4 times within first year for high-impact feature delivery, AI-driven CVE automation, and customer demo excellence ("Raise the Bar" & "Put Customers First")

Recognized by VP, Senior Principal Architect, and Product & Engineering Leadership for high-impact contributions to AI-based CVE automation, cloud cost optimization using telemetry data, and customer-facing demos; commended for delivering beyond assigned scope and ramping quickly on complex backend systems.
